name: Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD)
description: A massive 7T fMRI dataset in which 8 participants each viewed tens of thousands of natural photographs (from MS-COCO) across 30-40 scan sessions while performing a continuous recognition-memory task. Many images depict people, faces, and social scenes, so NSD supports high-powered within-subject studies of face and social-scene perception, visual memory, and image-computable models of the brain.
citation: Allen EJ, St-Yves G, Wu Y, et al. (2022). A massive 7T fMRI dataset to bridge cognitive neuroscience and artificial intelligence. Nature Neuroscience, 25(1), 116-126.
